title: rootless: store only subset of storage.conf
body:
do not store the entire file but only the subset of what we have
modified.  Also, we were not writing the correct data.  Since it is
not trivial to serialize storage.conf correctly and all the various
supported options, serialize only what we care about.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
this is how the generated `storage.conf` file looks like now:
```toml
[storage]
  driver = "overlay"
  runroot = "/run/user/1000"
  graphroot = "/home/foo/.local/share/containers/storage"
  [storage.options]
    mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
```

I'm going to assume the papr stuff is just papr being papr
